extension.summary: Guided setup wizard and update manager for SoLoKodi builds.
extension.description: Sets up SoLoKodi Kids or SoLoTV (Diggz Xenon). Installs sources, themes, Diggz repository, shortcuts, Real-Debrid, and checks for build updates from the hosted manifest.

extension.summary: Kids movies and shows through Real-Debrid.
extension.description: Browse kids and family content with TMDb, play from your Real-Debrid library, and stream cached titles when available. Uses Real-Debrid authorization from SoLoKodi Kids Setup. v0.2.3 improves modern kids TV discovery and torrent matching.

extension.summary: SoLoKodi builds — Kids, SoLoTV, and more.
extension.description: The SoLoKodi repository ships setup wizards, update managers, and build-specific add-ons. Install once, pick Kids or SoLoTV, and use the wizard to stay current.
